title: boesenbergia orbiculata
intro: Boesenbergia orbiculata, also known as Pinang or Daun Kunyit Merah, is a species of flowering plant in the ginger family (Zingiberaceae) native to Southeast Asia. It is widely used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Boesenbergia orbiculata include reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizome is typically dried and ground into a powder, or made into a tea or decoction, to be used in the treatment of various ailments.
